name: Father Time Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar and shortening. Beat until well blended. Add milk and vanilla; beat again.
3. Add egg to mixture; beat until combined.
4. Stir in flour, salt, and baking soda. Mix just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips.
5. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough 3 inches (7 cm) apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
6. Bake one sheet at a time for 8 to 10 minutes for chewy cookies, or 11 to 13 minutes for crisp cookies. Do not overbake. Cool on sheets for 2 minutes before transferring to foil to cool completely.
7. For icing: Combine icing sugar and 3 tablespoons (45 mL) water in a bowl. Mix until smooth. Adjust consistency with more water or icing sugar if needed, and add food coloring as desired. Pipe clock face designs onto cookies. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
